recommendations.title: Requiem for a Dream
recommendations.overview: The drug-induced utopias of four Coney Island residents are shattered when their addictions run deep.

recommendations.title: Pi
recommendations.overview: A mathematical genius discovers a link between numbers and reality, and thus believes he can predict the future.

recommendations.title: The Whale
recommendations.overview: A reclusive English teacher suffering from severe obesity attempts to reconnect with his estranged teenage daughter for one last chance at redemption.

recommendations.title: mother!
recommendations.overview: A couple's relationship is tested when uninvited guests arrive at their home, disrupting their tranquil existence.

recommendations.title: The Fountain
recommendations.overview: Spanning over one thousand years, and three parallel stories, The Fountain is a story of love, death, spirituality, and the fragility of our existence in this world.

recommendations.title: Black Swan
recommendations.overview: The story of Nina, a ballerina in a New York City ballet company whose life, like all those in her profession, is completely consumed with dance. She lives with her retired ballerina mother Erica who zealously supports her daughter's professional amb

recommendations.title: Noah
recommendations.overview: A man who suffers visions of an apocalyptic deluge takes measures to protect his family from the coming flood.

recommendations.title: The Wrestler
recommendations.overview: Aging wrestler Randy "The Ram" Robinson is long past his prime but still ready and rarin' to go on the pro-wrestling circuit. After a particularly brutal beating, however, Randy hangs up his tights, pursues a serious relationship with a long-in-the-t

recommendations.title: Carlito's Way
recommendations.overview: Free after years in prison, Carlito Brigante intends to give up his criminal ways, but it's not long before the ex-con is sucked back into the New York City underworld.

recommendations.title: Fierce People
recommendations.overview: A massage therapist looking to overcome her addictions and reconnect with her son, whose father is an anthropologist in South America studying the Yanomani people, moves in with a wealthy ex-client in New Jersey.
